---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 1) Problem statement

What operator or user problem are we solving?

## 2) Proposed solution

Describe the expected behavior and boundary.

## 3) Business value

- revenue impact
- operational efficiency impact
- risk reduction impact

## 4) Scope and dependencies

- affected modules
- external integrations
- env/secret requirements
- migration requirements

## 5) Validation plan

How will we confirm success after implementation?
